Package org.apache.juneau.http.header

Class Forwarded.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.header.Forwarded.Builder
Enclosing class:
Forwarded
public static class Forwarded.Builder extends Object
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Forwarded header value.

Composes the forwarding information defined by RFC 7239 into the key=value;key=value, key=value wire format: ;-separated parameters within a single forwarded element (one proxy hop) and ,-separated elements across hops. Typed setters cover the four registered parameters (by, for, host, proto); param(String, String) is a generic escape hatch. Values are emitted as bare tokens when possible and quoted automatically when they are not valid tokens (e.g. IPv6 node identifiers such as "[2001:db8::1]:8080"). Call next() to start a new hop.

Example:

String value = Forwarded.create() .forValue("192.0.2.60") .proto("http") .by("203.0.113.43") .next() .forValue("198.51.100.17") .build(); // => "for=192.0.2.60;proto=http;by=203.0.113.43, for=198.51.100.17"

See Also:
  • Forwarded
  • RFC 7239 - Forwarded HTTP Extension
Since:
10.0.0

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    build()
    Builds the rendered Forwarded header value.
    Forwarded.Builder
    by(String value)
    Sets the by parameter (the interface where the request came in to the proxy) on the current element.
    Forwarded.Builder
    forValue(String value)
    Sets the for parameter (the client that initiated the request) on the current element.
    Forwarded.Builder
    host(String value)
    Sets the host parameter (the original Host request header) on the current element.
    Forwarded.Builder
    next()
    Commits the current forwarded element and begins a new one (the next proxy hop).
    Forwarded.Builder
    param(String name, String value)
    Generic escape hatch for setting any forwarded parameter by name on the current element.
    Forwarded.Builder
    proto(String value)
    Sets the proto parameter (the protocol used to make the request) on the current element.
    Forwarded
    toHeader()
    Builds a Forwarded header bean directly from this builder.

    • Builder

      public Builder()
      Constructor.

  • Method Details

    • by

      public Forwarded.Builder by(String value)
      Sets the by parameter (the interface where the request came in to the proxy) on the current element.
      Parameters:
      value - The node identifier. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • forValue

      public Forwarded.Builder forValue(String value)
      Sets the for parameter (the client that initiated the request) on the current element.
      Parameters:
      value - The node identifier. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • host

      public Forwarded.Builder host(String value)
      Sets the host parameter (the original Host request header) on the current element.
      Parameters:
      value - The host. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • proto

      public Forwarded.Builder proto(String value)
      Sets the proto parameter (the protocol used to make the request) on the current element.
      Parameters:
      value - The protocol (e.g. "http", "https"). Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • param

      public Forwarded.Builder param(String name, String value)
      Generic escape hatch for setting any forwarded parameter by name on the current element.

      Replaces any previously-registered value for the same parameter while preserving its original position. The value is emitted as a bare token when valid, otherwise as an escaped quoted-string.

      Parameters:
      name - The parameter name. Must not be null or blank.
      value - The parameter value. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If name is null or blank.

    • next

      public Forwarded.Builder next()
      Commits the current forwarded element and begins a new one (the next proxy hop).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • build

      public String build()
      Builds the rendered Forwarded header value.

      Empty elements (hops with no parameters) are omitted. Returns an empty string when nothing has been registered.

      Returns:
      The header value. Never null.

    • toHeader

      public Forwarded toHeader()
      Builds a Forwarded header bean directly from this builder.
      Returns:
      A Forwarded carrying build(). Never null.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
